final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu (小红书) 9-grid cover vertical image for a "素人" (everyday-person) creator reviewing the DJI Pocket 4, styled as an authentic amateur lifestyle post.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu 素人 (everyday-person UGC) aesthetic, 9-grid cover layout, warm and approachable, non-polished amateur feel
Composition: 9-grid (九宫格) vertical cover layout; product DJI Pocket 4 prominently featured as the hero subject, center-weighted; central title text overlaid in the middle zone
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as the featured product, held or displayed naturally as a 素人 lifestyle shot; central headline title text "大疆pocket4初体验"
Scene/backdrop: casual, everyday lifestyle backdrop consistent with 素人 Xiaohongshu post — soft indoor or natural ambient setting
Lighting/mood: warm, soft, natural — approachable and genuine, not studio-lit
Color palette: warm pastel tones with soft neutrals, consistent with Xiaohongshu 素人 cover style
Materials/textures: natural textures, no glossy commercial finish
Text (verbatim): "大疆pocket4初体验" — displayed as the central title in a cute, differentiated, playful font (rounded, bubbly, or hand-lettered style)
Constraints: 9-grid vertical cover format; title text must be centered and legible; font must feel cute and visually distinct from generic sans-serif; product DJI Pocket 4 must be clearly identifiable
Avoid: overly polished commercial advertising look, studio lighting, generic flat design, standard corporate font, Western influencer aesthetic
